business_description: Sakura Spa is a professional massage therapy business specializing in relaxation and therapeutic treatments. We offer a range of massage services including regular massage, deep tissue massage, and hot stone massage to help clients unwind and address their wellness needs.
highlights: Offers both 30 and 60 minute massage sessions for flexible scheduling
Specializes in therapeutic deep tissue and relaxing hot stone treatments
Conveniently located on Yonge Street in Barrie with professional spa setting
